articles.title: R to @simonw: "Clone repo X from GitHub to /tmp for reference" is one of my most used prompting patterns This isn't the first time Claude Code on the web has regressed like this - it's really importan
articles.description:
"Clone repo X from GitHub to /tmp for reference" is one of my most used prompting patterns

This isn't the first time Claude Code on the web has regressed like this - it's really important functionality, please fix it and make sure it stays fixed!
